_meta.notes: Source of truth for everything downstream — page, campaigns, ad copy, JSON consumers. Individual product files are authoritative for specs; this JSON is the cross-product summary.

identity.name: Chamelo
identity.category: Smart eyewear · tint-adjustable and color-changing lenses
identity.wedge: Direct, on-demand control over your lens — tap or slide. Not auto-reactive. Not Transitions. The lens keeps up.
identity.real_product: We don't sell sunglasses. We sell control — over light, over environment, over how you see the world.
identity.mission_short: Chamelo is leading a new era of smart eyewear, leveraging cutting-edge technology to empower people to see the world on their terms.
identity.essence: Game-changing, performance-enhancing, and mood-boosting sunglasses. Made with next-gen Chamelo® lenses.

trust.expert_endorsement: Dr. Jay Schwartz · Phoenix Suns ophthalmologist

lens_technologies._note: Five proprietary lens technologies. Always use the trademarked name in customer copy — never the engineering name.

eclipse.name: Eclipse™
eclipse.control: Manual slider on temple · auto-activates when arms open
eclipse.neutrality: True, neutral black at all tint levels

alpha.name: Alpha™
alpha.engineering_name: Twisted nematic liquid crystal (internal use only)
alpha.type: Tint · varied modes (some polarized, some solar)

by_o.name: by O™
products: by O Lens (Aura frame with by O palette)

lens_technologies.claim_rule: Lead with the benefit, not the spec. The 0.1 seconds is the punchline, never the headline.

sport.name: Music Shield Gen 2
sport.status: Active hero · NBA Team Editions launching

lifestyle.name: Lion City
lifestyle.status: Pushing · Tortoise Trio anchor · Italian acetate

lifestyle.name: Lion City Rx
lifestyle.status: World's first electronic tint-changing Rx sunglasses

lifestyle.name: Zurix
lifestyle.status: Pushing · Tortoise Trio · women's market push

tortoise_trio.name: Tortoise Trio
tortoise_trio.notes: Lion City and Infinity are Italian acetate across all colorways; Zurix is acetate ONLY in the tortoise variant — standard Zurix is TR90.
approved_lines: Italian frames. Lenses engineered in Japan.
Hand-finished Italian acetate. Japanese liquid crystal film.
Smart glasses that don't look like smart glasses.

nba_team_editions.name: Music Shield Gen 2 NBA Team Editions
nba_team_editions.license_rules: Paid usage of NBA marks/logos/player likenesses is restricted by license. Always check claims register before publishing. Marbury is CBO — fine to reference; other players are not endorsing.
approved_lines: Built in Blue. Tuned for Orange.

ambassador_editions.colorway: Slate Blue + Gold · Amber high-contrast lens

ambassador_editions.base: Aura frame + by O Prismatic palette

ambassador_editions.status: In development · tied to French Open / Wimbledon / US Open

ambassadors.name: Stephon Marbury
ambassadors.role: Chief Brand Officer · Two-time NBA All-Star
ambassadors.works: Blind reactions, genuine surprise, off-the-cuff testimonials, basketball references
ambassadors.doesnt_work: Scripted product walkthroughs, generic hype-man energy

ambassadors.name: Alycia Baumgardner
ambassadors.works: Training environments, championship credibility, women's empowerment without preaching
ambassadors.doesnt_work: Forcing a fashion-first frame on a fighter

pillars.name: Confident and Knowledgeable
do: Use exact specs ('0.1 seconds', '63% to 17% VLT')

pillars.name: Keep It Real
dont: Script ambassadors out of their voice

customer_words_to_use._critical: Use the customer's exact word, not our marketing equivalent.
customer_words_to_use.instant: 65% of Amazon positives and 63% of Trustpilot positives use 'instant' or 'almost instant' — never 'fast', 'rapid', or 'lightning-quick'
customer_words_to_use.game_changer: Most repeated customer phrase — use it (customer voice, even though 'game-changing' is banned in brand voice)
customer_words_to_use.are_those_changing_color: The implied Aura compliment — use as a hook
customer_words_to_use.dont_have_to_think_about_it: The everyday-utility phrasing under-leveraged in current creative

banned_phrases: Game-changing (in brand voice — customer voice OK)
Take it to the next level
Premium build (at $200+ until temple-arm fix ships)
Improve your game / lower your score (Golf Shield — unsupportable)

universal_writing_rules.vlt_format: Larger (clearer) number first: '63% to 17%' NOT '17% to 63%'
universal_writing_rules.uv_format: Always '100% UVA/UVB protection.' Never '99.9%' in customer copy.
universal_writing_rules.speed: Use '0.1 seconds' when accuracy matters. Use 'instant' or 'instantly' in hero copy.
universal_writing_rules.audio: Always 'open-ear audio' or 'Bluetooth audio.' Never 'bone conduction' or 'headphones.'
universal_writing_rules.charging: Use 'magnetic charging cable.' Do NOT specify USB-A or USB-C until older inventory clears.
universal_writing_rules.customer_count: Brand-level: '100,000+ customers.' The 50K+ figure is Music Shield Gen 1 unit sales only.
universal_writing_rules.bundles: Never bundle framing. Every product is an individual SKU.
universal_writing_rules.pricing: Reference both MSRP and current selling price when length allows: '$199 (MSRP $299)'
universal_writing_rules.lens_tech_naming: Always use trademarked name (Eclipse™, Prismatic™, HVL™, Alpha™, by O™) in customer copy. Never the engineering name.

audiences._note: Full audience messaging lives in 05-use-case-messaging.md. Summary below.
validated: Aura compliments-driven style buyer (dominant Aura pattern)
Skiers (Aroza — sunny day, NOT flat light)
Triathletes (Shield — no audio for race rules)
emerging: Truck drivers (n=1 verbatim, strongest single anecdote)
Ray-Ban Meta privacy skeptic (no camera / no AI)

rules: Soul ID training required for any AI-generated human likeness — no generic AI faces
Figma finishing required for any AI-generated visual — no raw Higgsfield / kie.ai outputs
AI-generated voices NOT used in paid ads — real ambassadors, real VO, real customers only
Every AI-generated ad carries Meta's AI Content Label per policy
